hub.title: Adapter Hub
hub.searchPlaceholder: Search adapter name, description, tags, or config class
hub.emptyTitle: No adapters match the current filters
hub.emptyDescription: Try a different keyword or status filter.

home.author: Author
home.noDocs: No documentation available for this adapter.

override.info: Settings here will override the system defaults for this adapter. If an override is enabled, all chats under this adapter will use these values by default, unless the chat itself overrides them again.
override.emptyMessage: No overridable settings available for this adapter

napcat.tokenCopied: NapCat WebUI Token copied to clipboard

openilinkLogin.title: WeChat QR Login
openilinkLogin.description: Scan the QR code with WeChat and confirm on your phone so the OpenILink adapter can start sending and receiving messages.
openilinkLogin.waitingQr: Waiting for OpenILink to generate a login QR code. Make sure the adapter is enabled and starting.
openilinkLogin.noQrLoggedIn: The account is already logged in. No scan is required.

messages.idle: The adapter has not started the login flow yet.
messages.waiting: Waiting for the QR code to be generated.
messages.qr: Scan the QR code below with WeChat.
messages.scanned: Scanned. Confirm login on your phone.
messages.expired: The QR code has expired. Wait for the adapter to refresh it.
messages.stopped: The adapter is stopped. Enable it and restart the service.
messages.unavailable: The adapter instance is currently unavailable.

logs.connectFailed: Failed to connect to log stream
logs.restartTimeout: Container restart timed out, please check status
logs.tokenNotFound: WebUI Token not found, restart container to generate

config.notSupportedMessage: This adapter has no configurable parameters.

advanced.restartHint: Changes to adapter enablement and some settings require an application restart to take effect.
advanced.chatRulesDesc: This adapter uses the following format to identify chat channels:

emails.title: Email List
emails.subtitle: Browse synced emails by time and open any message to read the body and headers.
emails.subject: Subject
emails.bodyEmpty: This email does not contain displayable body content.
emails.selectHint: Select an email from the list to view its details.

emailAccounts.title: Email Accounts
emailAccounts.description: Manage receiving and sending accounts for the Email adapter. Account data is still stored in the adapter RECEIVE_ACCOUNTS config, not in the database.
emailAccounts.clientSecretHelp: Leave blank to keep the existing Client Secret.
emailAccounts.tenantIdHelp: Use common for personal accounts, organizations for work accounts, or a specific tenant ID.
emailAccounts.oauthPending: Click connect to save the account automatically and open the official login page. After login, the authorized Google / Microsoft email address will be used automatically.
emailAccounts.saveBeforeAuthorize: Save the account before starting official authorization.
emailAccounts.authorizeUrlFailed: Failed to open official login page
emailAccounts.manualCallbackDescription: After login, if the browser stops on an unreachable localhost page, copy the full callback URL from the address bar and paste it here.
emailAccounts.invalidCallbackUrl: Invalid callback URL. Make sure it contains code and state parameters.
emailAccounts.passwordPlaceholder: Already configured; leave blank to keep it
emailAccounts.passwordHelp: Leave blank to keep the existing password or app password.
emailAccounts.deleteConfirm: Delete this email account? This only removes the config entry and will not delete historical emails.
emailAccounts.pullResultSummary: Account {{account}}, folder {{mailbox}}: found {{found}}, processed {{processed}}, failed {{failed}}, marked seen {{marked}}, skipped {{skipped}}, duration {{duration}}ms

oauthHints.Gmail: Gmail requires official Google login. Fill the App Client ID / Secret, save the account, then connect Google.
oauthHints.Outlook: Outlook / Microsoft 365 requires official Microsoft login. Fill the App Client ID / Secret, save the account, then connect Microsoft.

providerLinks.description: Open the provider page first to create an OAuth app:
